name: waggle
description: Higher-level capture client and orchestrator built on top of BrowserHive (https://github.com/uraitakahito/browserhive).

scripts.openapi:check: npm run openapi:generate && git diff --exit-code -- src/http/generated
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build && node dist/db/migrate.js up
scripts.db:migrate:down: npm run build && node dist/db/migrate.js down
scripts.db:seed: npm run build && node dist/db/seed.js up
scripts.db:seed:down: npm run build && node dist/db/seed.js down
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
